subgoals.details: Ensure Fetch_AR_DATA tool is called with the CompanyCode F001 and CustomerAccount C0001.
Ensure that the analysis for customer Bohr und Hammer GmbH Tools includes information on Total Amount in Company Code Currency that amounts to 34,673,013.30 EUR.
Ensure that analysis provides insights on prioritizing Dispute ID 33405 (€20,750,089.32).

Ensure that the Set Payment Block tool is called with the CompanyCode F001, FiscalYear 2017, Code A, AccountingDocument 1400019736, and AccountingDocumentItem 002. Ensure that the payment block is reported as successful after this tool call.
Ensure that the calculator tool is used to calculate the total Disputed Amount that amounts to 21,750,089.32 EUR.
Ensure that the calculator tool is used to calculate the total Non-Disputed Overdue Amount that amounts to 12,922,924 EUR.
Ensure that agent's analysis includes action SUGGESTION to either set payment block or remove payment block.

input.content: You are a user trying to get help analyzing customer account C0001 under company code F001. When the assistant provides you with the analysis of customer account C0001 under company code F001,  you will ask the assistant to set a payment block on Accounting Document 1400019736, item 002, company code F001, for fiscal year 2017. If prompted for a payment block reason code, provide: 'A'. If prompted for a note, write no remarks. If prompted to approve the payment block, reply "approve: true"  without the quotation. Task is considered to be completed upon setting the payment block successfully.
